heading: Establishment of program
label: 300ee–11 Establishment of program
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2501 of act , was successively renumbered by subsequent acts, see .July 1, 1944section 238 of this title

children.heading: Allotments for States
children.label: a Allotments for States
children.text: For the purpose described in subsection (b), the Secretary shall for each of the fiscal years 1989 through 1991 make an allotment for each State in an amount determined in accordance with . The Secretary shall make payments each such fiscal year to each State from the allotment for the State if the Secretary approves for the fiscal year involved an application submitted by the State pursuant to .section 300ee–17 of this titlesection 300ee–13 of this title

children.heading: Purpose of grants
children.label: b Purpose of grants
children.text: The Secretary may not make payments under subsection (a) for a fiscal year unless the State involved agrees to expend the payments only for the purpose of carrying out, in accordance with , public information activities with respect to acquired immune deficiency syndrome.section 300ee–12 of this title
